title: Passport Access Class
description: A named access class for a Digital Product Passport. Defines who belongs to this class and which field paths they can read. Regulation packs inject Annex XIII, ESPR, or other access tiers at passport construction time.

className.description: Access class name, e.g. public, authority, legitimate_interest, manufacturer

description.description: Human-readable description of who belongs to this class

readablePaths.description: Field paths readable by this class. Supports * (single element) and ** (recursive wildcard).

condition.description: Optional condition that must be satisfied for access (e.g. legitimate_interest_verified)

regulationSource.description: Normative source that defines this access class

effectiveFrom.description: ISO-8601 date when this access class becomes operative
